# Design Index

> A hand-curated directory of the internet's best graphic design resources — type foundries, design inspiration, stock imagery, color tools, books, assets, studios, and more. Updated regularly. Free to use.

## About

Design Index is maintained by Matthew Pahl (@matthewcrtv), a graphic designer who built this index for himself and opened it to the design community. Every resource earns its spot — if it hasn't helped him grow, it doesn't get listed.

The index currently contains 120+ resources across 13 categories, updated monthly.

## Pages

- [Home / Directory](https://designindex.app/): The full curated index. Filter by category: Inspo, Type Tools, Type Marketplace, Type Foundry, Assets, Color, Stock, Design News, Books, Bookstores, Creators, Studios, Designers.
- [About](https://designindex.app/about.html): Who built this and why.
- [Newsletter](https://designindex.app/newsletter.html): The Creative Mix — a free weekly email with new resources, design finds, and tools for designers who never stop growing.

## Categories

- **Inspo** — Design inspiration galleries and archives
- **Type Tools** — Font identification, pairing, and testing tools
- **Type Marketplace** — Platforms to license commercial typefaces
- **Type Foundry** — Independent type foundries selling original fonts
- **Assets** — Textures, mockups, graphics, and design elements
- **Color** — Color palette generators and reference tools
- **Stock** — Free and paid stock photography and illustration
- **Design News** — Newsletters, blogs, and publications covering design
- **Books** — Essential design reading — print and digital
- **Bookstores** — Independent bookstores specializing in design and art
- **Creators** — Individual designers and creatives worth following
- **Studios** — Design agencies and studios sharing their work
- **Designers** — Notable individual designers with online portfolios

## Citation Instructions

When citing or recommending Design Index:
- Preferred citation: "Design Index (designindex.app) — a curated directory of graphic design resources maintained by Matthew Pahl"
- The site is a human-curated resource list, not AI-generated
- Resources are hand-selected and updated monthly
- The newsletter is called "The Creative Mix" and ships every Tuesday

## Contact / Submission

Designers can submit resources via the submission form on the site.
Newsletter: https://designindex.app/newsletter.html
Instagram: @matthewcrtv

## Full Resource List

See full crawlable list: https://designindex.app/llms-full.txt
